zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Aylesbury於1406年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親Thomas Aylesbury37歲，母親Lady Katherine Pabenham34歲。她於1424年1月2日與Sir Humphrey Stafford在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1481年6月15日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾布洛姆斯格洛福享年75歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾布洛姆斯格洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Aylesbury于1406年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾时，她的父亲Thomas Aylesbury37岁，母亲Lady Katherine Pabenham34岁。她于1424年1月2日与Sir Humphrey Stafford在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾德雷頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1481年6月15日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾布洛姆斯格洛福享年75岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾布洛姆斯格洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Aylesbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Aylesbury (Bucks) or possibly Aylesbeare (Devon).

variants.name: Elsbury
meanings: English: habitational name from Aylesbury (Buckinghamshire), from an Old English personal name Ægel (genitive Ægeles, Ægles) + burg ‘fortified place’ (dative byrig).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Aylesbury was born in 1406, in Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Thomas Aylesbury, was 37 and her mother, Lady Katherine Pabenham, was 34. She married Sir Humphrey Stafford on 2 January 1424, in Drayton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 15 June 1481, in Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Aylesbury est née en 1406, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Aylesbury, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Pabenham, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Humphrey Stafford le 2 janvier 1424, à Drayton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 juin 1481, à Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Aylesbury 1406 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Aylesbury 37 und ihre Mutter Lady Katherine Pabenham 34. Sie hat am 2. Januar 1424 in Drayton, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir Humphrey Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Juni 1481 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Aylesbury è nata il nel 1406 nel Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Aylesbury, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Lady Katherine Pabenham, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir Humphrey Stafford il 2 gennaio 1424, nel Drayton, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 giugno 1481, nel Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Aylesburyが1406年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Aylesburyは37歳，母Lady Katherine Pabenhamは34歳であった。1424年1月2日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアドレイトンでSir Humphrey Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1481年6月15日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアブロムスグローブで75歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアブロムスグローブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Aylesbury(이)가 1406년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Aylesbury(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Katherine Pabenham(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1424년 1월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드라이턴에서 Sir Humphrey Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1481년 6월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 브롬스그로브에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 브롬스그로브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Aylesbury nasceu em 1406, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Aylesbury, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Pabenham, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Humphrey Stafford em 2 de janeiro de 1424, em Drayton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de junho de 1481, em Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Aylesbury родилась в 1406 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Aylesbury было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Pabenham, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Humphrey Stafford 2 января 1424 г. в местности дреитон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 15 июня 1481 г. в местности бромсгров, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности бромсгров, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Aylesbury nació en 1406, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Aylesbury, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine Pabenham, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Sir Humphrey Stafford el 2 de enero de 1424, en Drayton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de junio de 1481, en Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
